# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and related to one issue/theme
- [ ] Site renders correctly on desktop and mobile
- [ ] Keyboard navigation and focus states verified
- [ ] No new console errors
- [ ] CI passes

## Verification

List steps used to verify the change.

## Screenshots (if UI changed)

Attach before/after screenshots.
